confirmDeletePattern: Delete this custom pattern? Bands using it revert to their built-in style.
alertPatternDropped: Some saved patterns couldn't be read and were skipped.
alertPatternMissing: This preset uses a custom pattern that couldn't be loaded; those bands use their built-in style.
alertSvgLarge: This sculpture is very large; the SVG export may be slow and the file big.
alertNoPlates: No enabled bands or layers to export as plates.
alertMicInit: Failed to initialize the microphone. Please check your browser settings.
alertNotStarted: Drawing or playback has not started, so recording cannot begin.
alertNoAudioTrack: Error: could not capture an audio track.
alertVideoInit: Failed to initialize video recording. Your browser may not support it.
alertSelectJson: Error: please choose a JSON file.
alertPresetIncompatible: This preset uses an older band layout (pre-rainbow); some band settings were not applied.
alertPresetInvalid: Error: this file is not a valid preset.
alertVideoUnsupported: Video recording isn't supported in this browser.
alertViewerUnsupported: The viewing window isn't supported in this browser (it needs BroadcastChannel).
alertSoundLoad: Couldn't load this audio file. Your browser may not support its format.
alertMicUnsupported: Microphone capture isn't available here. It needs a secure (https) connection and a supported browser.
